name: 05-11-05-11-npc-simulation-dashboard-route
title: Connect NPC Simulation Status to Owner Management Route
description: Wire NpcSimulationOverview (five-dimensional status: energy/hunger/thirst/social/entertainment, mood, traits, social memories, mobility) into /tavern/:id/manage route so tavern owners can view their NPCs' simulation state.
creator: lijin
notes: NpcSimulationOverview exists in tavern-owner-management feature but is not imported in any route. Backend simulation_worker.py implements tick engine and state management.
